# Pyfastmvc

Production-grade MVC Framework for FastAPI - Generate projects, entities, and migrations with a single command

## Install

```bash
pip install pyfastmvc
```

Editable (development):

```bash
pip install -e .
```

## Repository

`https://github.com/shregar1/pyfastmvc`

## Tooling

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md), [Makefile](Makefile), and [PUBLISHING.md](PUBLISHING.md).
